title: Automatic Sugarcane Bud Cutter Machine
description: Conveyor-fed automatic sugarcane stalk sectioning machine using optical node detection and TCT circular blade to produce 2-bud setts at 600/hour for agricultural planting.
objective: Detect inter-node positions optically; cut setts 250–300 mm with 2 buds each; throughput ≥ 600 setts/hour; germination rate ≥ 85%.
constraints: 3-phase 750 W power; Arduino Uno controller; blade disinfection between rows; BOM < ₹20 000.
supporting_fact_titles: Sugarcane Processing — Node Cutting and Bud Viability
design_element_titles: Sugarcane Bud Cutter — Rotary Blade with Node Sensor
DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control
TCS3200 Color Sensor for Product Sorting

element_usage_notes.Sugarcane Bud Cutter — Rotary Blade with: TCT blade 300 mm dia; 3000 RPM; TCR5000 optical node sensor.
element_usage_notes.DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control: Drives conveyor belt at 0.15 m/s feed rate.
